title: use separate AST class for program

features.name: program block distinct from module
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog program block used as a testbench construct, distinct from a module declaration, to exercise the program construct's separate semantic scope and scheduling rules

features.name: program block with port list
features.description: Code should include a program block with a declared port list, instantiated from a module, to verify the tool correctly distinguishes program instances from module instances
